changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true

changeSet.comment: Add Virus Isolation page (Page 10) to Virology template
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_page ( id, title, instructions, content, page_order, completed, page_type, notebook_id, last_updated ) SELECT nextval('clinlims.notebook_page_seq'), 'Virus Isolation', 'Isolate virus from culture batches. Record isolation batch ID, link to source culture batch, method, virus strain, and passage number.', 'Virus Isolation - Isolate virus from culture with full traceability', 10, false, 'BULK_DATA_ENTRY', n.id, now() FROM clinlims.notebook n WHERE n.title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND n.is_template = true AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_page np WHERE np.notebook_id = n.id AND np.page_order = 10 );

changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true

changeSet.comment: Add Virus Isolation page (Page 10) to existing Virology notebook instances
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_page ( id, title, instructions, content, page_order, completed, page_type, notebook_id, last_updated ) SELECT nextval('clinlims.notebook_page_seq'), 'Virus Isolation', 'Isolate virus from culture batches. Record isolation batch ID, link to source culture batch, method, virus strain, and passage number.', 'Virus Isolation - Isolate virus from culture with full traceability', 10, false, 'BULK_DATA_ENTRY', n.id, now() FROM clinlims.notebook n WHERE n.title LIKE '%Virology%' AND n.is_template = false AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_page np WHERE np.notebook_id = n.id AND np.page_order = 10 );
